word: H4788 - מָרוּד - mârûwd - maw-rood' - Cast out

sections.paragraph:
Original: מרוּד

Transliteration: mârûd

Phonetic: maw-rood'

BDB Definition:

  1. restlessness, straying, wanderer, refugee

Origin: from H7300 in the sense of maltreatment

TWOT entry: 2129a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
